html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Scaled Flooring is a type of craftable Turf in Don't Starve Together. It is crafted with Scales and a Cut Stone. Like all other turfs, and in spite of its fireproof qualities, Scaled Flooring can be used as fuel and can be lit on fire if left on the ground as an item.

Scaled Flooring completely prevent fire spreading from a burning entity and structures. However, this effect does not stop things from being ignited by directly lighting objects on fire (with a Torch) or smoldering items (usually caused by Wildfires).

The effect also works when items are placed on top of them.

Scaled Flooring does not block heat; Thermal Stones and players will still heat up at normal distances from heat sources.

Tips

  • Scaled Flooring can be used to duplicate Scales by using a Deconstruction Staff, since four Scaled Flooring are made each batch. This can be used to mass-produce Scales from at least one Scales.

Gallery

  • Scaled Flooring texture.
  • Wigfrid standing on Scaled Flooring.
TurfsCraftable Items

“Do you want proof that it's fireproof?”
–Wilson
“My lighter doesn't work on it.”
–Willow
“Hot step stones.”
–Wolfgang
“Some ground.”
–Wendy
“CONDITION: INFLAMMABLE. WAIT. NOT FLAMMABLE?”
–WX-78
“This substance is imbued with a sort of natural fire deterrent.”
–Wickerbottom
“Fire doesn't quite take here, eh?”
–Woodie
“It's warm, but quells flame.”
–Maxwell
“A warm piece öf the battlefield.”
–Wigfrid
“Warm and cozy ground!”
–Webber
“It's like an ingredient for the ground.”
–Warly
“Fire can't come here!”
–Wormwood
“That's a chunk of fancy ground.”
–Winona
“Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.”
–Wortox
“Scaly ground!”
–Wurt
“Finally something fireproof!”
–Walter
“This might actually be useful.”
–Wanda
“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”
-
Scaled Flooring is a type of craftable Turf in Don't Starve Together. It is crafted with Scales and a Cut Stone. Like all other turfs, and in spite of its fireproof qualities, Scaled Flooring can be used as fuel and can be lit on fire if left on the ground as an item.
Scaled Flooring completely prevent fire spreading from a burning entity and structures. However, this effect does not stop things from being ignited by directly lighting objects on fire (with a Torch) or smoldering items (usually caused by Wildfires).
The effect also works when items are placed on top of them.
Scaled Flooring does not block heat; Thermal Stones and players will still heat up at normal distances from heat sources.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sàn Thu Nhỏ là một loại Đất có thể chế tạo được trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được chế tạo bằng Cân và Đá Cắt. Giống như tất cả các loại cỏ khác, và mặc dù có đặc tính chống cháy, Sàn vảy có thể được sử dụng làm nhiên liệu và có thể đốt cháy nếu để trên mặt đất như một vật phẩm.

{{Scrapbook Info|Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.}}
'''Scaled Flooring''' is a type of craftable [[Turfs|Turf]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]].'' It is crafted with [[Scales]] and a [[Cut Stone]]. Like all other turfs, and in spite of its fireproof qualities, Scaled Flooring can be used as fuel and can be lit on fire if left on the ground as an item.

Scaled Flooring completely prevent fire spreading from a burning entity and structures. However, this effect does not stop things from being ignited by directly lighting objects on fire (with a [[Torch]]) or smoldering items (usually caused by [[Wildfires]]).

The effect also works when items are placed on top of them.

Scaled Flooring does not block heat; [[Thermal Stone]]s and players will still heat up at normal distances from heat sources. 

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
* Scaled Flooring can be used to duplicate Scales by using a [[Deconstruction Staff]], since four Scaled Flooring are made each batch. This can be used to mass-produce Scales from at least one Scales.
